published_prior_art.cite: DukesShpitserTchetgen2023: proximal mediation point-identifies natural direct and indirect effects under proxy bridge/completeness conditions
GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 and ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023: proximal/proxy inference without completeness or uniqueness, but not this binary natural-mediation rank-one phase diagram

GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 plus MilesKankiMeloniTchetgen2017/DingVanderWeele2016/CaiKurokiPearlTian2008: proxy partial-ID and no-proxy mediation bounds cover nearby ground but not the stated tightening criterion

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses Ghassami, Shpitser, and Tchetgen Tchetgen 2023, Partial Identification of Causal Effects Using Proxy Variables, and Zhang, Li, Miao, and Tchetgen Tchetgen 2023, Proximal Causal Inference without Uniqueness Assumptions, which are closer to the bridge-nonuniqueness kernel than several no-proxy mediation papers.

novelty_flags.label: Related work / Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: MilesKankiMeloniTchetgen2017 is cited as deriving bounds for natural direct and indirect effects, but the verified published item is On Partial Identification of the Natural Indirect Effect; the direct-effect arXiv comparator should be separated or cited accurately.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The notation Theta_I(P) is used first for the joint identified set of (PNDE,TNIE) and then for the TNIE coordinate interval, creating a load-bearing clash.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The lambdaD/lambdaI loading coefficients are only described verbally; the zero-loading point-ID criterion is not checkable until the exact observed mediator-weight formulas are stated.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The terms endpoint-completing latent response type and endpoint-compatible are not formally defined, so the strict-tightening iff condition is not yet a mathematical statement.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a direct §5 and §8 comparison to Ghassami-Shpitser-Tchetgen Tchetgen 2023 and Zhang-Li-Miao-Tchetgen Tchetgen 2023, stating exactly why the natural-mediation rank-one closed form is not subsumed by generic proxy partial-ID or nonunique-bridge linear-functional results.
Replace the verbal loading definition with explicit finite-sum formulas for the PNDE and TNIE coefficients in each (a,m,x) proxy-null cell.
Rename the joint identified set and the TNIE coordinate interval separately, for example Theta_joint(P), Theta_D(P), and Theta_NIE(P).
Formalize Conjecture 2's endpoint-compatibility condition as a finite response-type LP face condition and add one binary example where a rank-one proxy strictly shortens a no-proxy endpoint.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison and make Conjectures 1-2 well-posed by defining the loadings, endpoint-compatibility condition, and nonclashing identified-set notation.
